name: Another Way of Gettin' Paid
short_description: Japanese romance VN from hit developer PacoPaco Soft! As Shunji's various acquaintances begin to interact in ways they were never supposed to, he finds his social circle expanding farther than he could have ever imagined...
detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY & FEATURES

  • Multi-choice, single-ending VN with 2+ hours till credits

STORY

Ever since his college days, Shunji Naruse has been working with the female president of a real estate company, Mizuru Kozuki. He works as her private secretary.

One day, Shunji's pleasant life gets even better when he befriends a girl, Chisato Hinata.

Things grow even livelier when a divorced wife and one of Mizuru's old classmates, Kasumi Tachibana; as well as Chisato's friend, Hasumi Tachibana—get added to the mix.

As his various acquaintances begin to interact in ways they were never supposed to, Shunji finds his social circle expanding farther than he could have ever imagined...

CHARACTERS

Mizuru Kozuki (Voice: Ichigo Momoi)
A married woman and president of a large real estate company.

Chisato Hinata (Voice: Mashiro Kazahana)
A stylish girl who attends a high-ranking school.

Kasumi Tachibana (Voice: Mikoto Natsuno)
The only daughter of a wealthy, distinguished family. A divorced wife, and Hasumi's mother.

Hasumi Tachibana (Voice: Kazane)Chisato's longtime friend and classmate.
